back_disabled_tooltip: The return is unavailable once the order is confirmed.
faq_description: Please consult our FAQ to resolve the most common issues.
step1_add_more_servers_hint: You will be able to add other servers to protect once the initial configuration is complete.
baremetals_error: An error occurred while loading your Bare Metal servers.
terms_placeholder: Select a server to view the applicable contracts.

step1_order_confirmation_hint: By confirming your order, OVHcloud will create a secure backup space (vault) and a VSPC management server, and will automatically configure the backup of your server.

checkout_no_payment_error: No default payment method is configured on your account. Please add one before placing the order.
step2_locked_hint: This step will be available once step 1 is completed.
step2_creating: Creating your backup service in progress...
step2_error_creation: The creation of the service has failed.
step2_timeout: Provisioning is taking longer than expected.
agent_panel_description: Install the backup agent on your server while provisioning completes.
agent_terminal_placeholder: Select an operating system to view the commands.
agent_url_unavailable: The download link is unavailable for this operating system.
agent_error: An error occurred while loading the download links.
